author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint V.3 — ViT-B/16 forward parity. Approach: (1) BEFORE probe run on existing vit_b_16_* tests in conformance_vision_models.rs; (2) extend test file with full logit-parity fixture entries referencing fixtures_v_parity.json (new file per sprint spec); (3) extend regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py (new script per sprint spec) to emit seeded synthetic input + reference logit vector for vit_b_16 with F32_MATMUL=1e-3 tolerance; (4) run AFTER probe; (5) run workspace build + clippy; (6) close. Reference: torchvision 0.21.x, torch 2.11.0. Random-init weights, seeded input, no weight download needed for shape+finite tests; logit-parity uses seeded weights set to zero for determinism.
